posts.author: Streak
posts.text: Pathetic Streak — @beherat We understand that the transition to the new version has impacted your overall experience. Please note that the older version of Streak has now been deprecated and is no longer accessible, as the team is currently focused on improving and enhancing the new platform. At present, the primary focus is on the release of the Streak mobile app, which is tentatively expected by the end of this month, while parallel efforts continue towards adding the remaining functionalities and workflow improvements to the web platform. Most of the core features from the previous version…

posts.author: Abhijit
posts.text: Pathetic Streak — I stopped using it after they launched the new version. So many important features were missing. They said the missing features would be rolled out gradually, but it’s been months with little to no progress on the ones that actually matter. Releasing this as a beta version while discontinuing the older version was a poor decision. Very disappointed with Streak’s strategy.

posts.author: beherat
posts.text: Pathetic Streak — This version of Streak is still pathetic after couple of monthe of it’s release. How can I get access to the previous version of Streak, where I could easily create strategies and backtest those as well, and deploy in live market? In the new version, I can’t even use the future as an underlying asset for option trading. Live deployment is missing too. What is the use of the early release if you can’t give the bare minimun features in new version? You could have maintained 2 versions separately till the time you give at least the existing features in the new version.
